caption: A video game simulation of an American football game takes place in a crowded stadium. Players in white uniforms and players in dark uniforms are scattered across a green field marked with white yard lines and a large yellow and red logo. At the bottom left of the screen, a small window shows a blonde man in a dark blue shirt watching the action. Across the top, a scoreboard displays "ULTIMATE TEAM" and indicates the game is in the "3rd" quarter with "0:12" remaining, showing a score of "14" and "7". As the play unfolds, a player in white throws a pass. In the later stages of the clip, the text "PERFECT ACCURACY" and "BULLET PASS" appears in yellow on the field. The man in the window looks on with a surprised expression as the play progresses toward the end zone.
